title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Kinemon, Unknown person #9, Jinbe, Luffy, Unknown person #10, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Oi, Kinemon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oi, Mosshead, where'd you find that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There were enemies!! Nahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I told you it smelled like booze!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's with that nose of his...?! <

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They defea- Ted all the gatekeepers?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was supposed to be the first hurdle!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Great, now that we found alcohol, then...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: To celebrate jinbe joining our crew...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy- Dono!! I am extremely grateful

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You took care of the guardians of this gate in a flash!! Thank you very much!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, to all ships, get ready to storm into onigashima!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yea aah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These straw hats!! We can really count on them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, the faster we get in, the better our chances will be!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's hit em before they know what's happening!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmmm?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's do it with them!! The toast... and the banquet!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: SHISHISH!!! LET'S GO BEAT UP KAIDO!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Then Crochi and Big Mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's win this war...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Then throw the biggest banquet ever!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That will be the best booze we'll ever taste!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hehehe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Move, you squirts!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't let anybody take Kaido's head other than us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Right, killer?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: FAFAFAFA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I take his head, I'll make it my ship's figurehead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: FAFAFA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! How dare they make killer so joyous!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Imagine if we became the joyous pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Stop that!! FAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAFAF

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: FAFAFA!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Jaggy!! That bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It looks like they're having a great time!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: JINBE!! We can't lose a sea race against JAGGY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wahaha!! Under- stood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Leave it all to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Crack!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAAH...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 01! Can't ya even hold your keg properly?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is why I hate Drinkin' with you lot!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: JUKIK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Being BeBeng Beberg!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come closer!! Yes, come just a little bit closer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O!!! I'm out of red bean soup here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please be patient!! The next batch of food is for big mom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get off your ass and make some more then!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WARF! What is he doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sorry, who..?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My son!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he going to show up at the very least?! This is a banquet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to search for him right now!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Master Kaido, the flying six are here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They've asked for an audience!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, that's right. I wanted to introduce them to Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: By the way, where is she?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She's currently putting on a Kimono!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What AAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: The flying six...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Have arrived!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Make way!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 67 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
